data.title: [HIGH] Insufficient Rate Limiting on Authentication Endpoints
data.description:
## Problem

No rate limiting detected on critical authentication endpoints:

* `/sso` (SSO initiation)
* `/sso/saml/acs` (Assertion processing - CPU-intensive XML parsing + crypto)
* `/token` (Token issuance)

**Location**: `internal/api/sso.go`, `internal/api/samlacs.go`, `internal/api/token.go`

## Impact

* DoS attacks via resource exhaustion
* Brute force authentication attempts
* XML bomb attacks (no size limits)
* OWASP A07:2021 - Authentication Failures

## Solution

1. Rate limiting middleware (5 req/min per IP for /sso)
2. Exponential backoff for failed authentication attempts
3. Circuit breaker for XML parsing (prevent XML bombs)
4. Request size limits (max 1MB for SAML assertions)

**Effort**: Medium (16 hours)
**Blocking**: Yes - required before production

See PRODUCTION_READINESS.md Issue #3 for full details.
